message:
feat(sql): add ROLLUP/CUBE/GROUPING SETS support

- Add ROLLUP, CUBE, GROUPING, SETS tokens
- Parse GROUP BY ROLLUP(cols), CUBE(cols), GROUPING SETS(...)
- Generate grouping combinations for hierarchical (ROLLUP)
  and all-combinations (CUBE) aggregations
- Execute multi-pass aggregation for each grouping set
- Track rolled-up columns with __grouping_col markers
- Add GROUPING() function to detect super-aggregate rows
